iot.securityprofile.metricvalue.Cidrs.Description: If the `comparisonOperator` calls for a set of CIDRs, use this to specify that set to be compared with the `metric`.

iot.securityprofile.metricvalue.Count.Description: If the `comparisonOperator` calls for a numeric value, use this to specify that numeric value to be compared with the `metric`.

iot.securityprofile.metricvalue.Number.Description: The numeric values of a metric.

iot.securityprofile.metricvalue.Numbers.Description: The numeric value of a metric.

iot.securityprofile.metricvalue.Ports.Description: If the `comparisonOperator` calls for a set of ports, use this to specify that set to be compared with the `metric`.

iot.securityprofile.metricvalue.Strings.Description: The string values of a metric.
